problem id: eb252a80
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01010010 -> 00101111
  01010101 -> 11111111
  00001010 -> 11101111
  10101101 -> 00110111
  01001110 -> 01001101
  11010011 -> 00011011
  10101100 -> 00011111
  01010001 -> 01011111

query: 10000101
predicted answer: 01110011
